'''Dif Istuvi''' was a hierophant of the religion known as [[Cosmic Balance]], and was largely responsible for that religion's expansion on [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]]. Istuvi also wrote the [[Fulcrum (text)|''Fulcrum'']], the Cosmic Balance's holy text, and established the [[Zanazi]], an order of priest-prophets of the Cosmic Balance.<ref name="GatORW" />

{{Char-stub}}
